testcase.name: testCreateEmployeesXML
testcase.system-err:
org.glassfish.jaxb.runtime.v2.runtime.IllegalAnnotationsException: 1 counts of IllegalAnnotationExceptions - Class has two properties of the same name "employees" this problem is related to the following location: at public java.util.List org.fujitsu.training.codes.Employees.getEmployees() at org.fujitsu.training.codes.Employees this problem is related to the following location: at public java.util.List org.fujitsu.training.codes.Employees.employees at org.fujitsu.training.codes.Employees
